label: left-side
prompt:
A 3:4 portrait editorial illustration on a solid cream background #f7f5f2.

Composition: Xiaoxiang, the baby elephant mascot, sitting calmly on the cream ground facing right, trunk curled gently upward, looking quietly toward the right side of the frame. Very simple and minimal — just the mascot centered in the lower third of a tall vertical canvas, with generous negative space (~50%+) above and around it. Soft, calm, unobtrusive.

CHARACTER (locked, keep exactly on the reference model): the recurring mascot — Xiaoxiang, the baby elephant mascot from the reference image: soft rounded elephant body, oversized ears, curled trunk, small tusks, rounded limbs and feet, red-and-white propeller beanie, and short red cape; keep the same face, proportions, costume, and children's-book plush illustration treatment as the reference. The ONLY accent-colored character parts are the red beanie and red cape. The mascot is a solid OPAQUE shape in front of the background — no ground line or shadow passes through its body. Follow the reference image for character value and color treatment.

LINE LANGUAGE: draw EVERYTHING — mascot, objects, arrows — in ONE bold, even-weight, softly-rounded outline (clean vinyl-sticker line), not thin scratchy sketch lines.

STYLE: warm children's-book plush illustration. Soft fur or fabric texture, gentle cel-shaded volume, subtle hand-drawn interior detail, friendly color, and a plain warm cream paper background. No photorealism, no 3D render, no glossy UI/vector style, no logo, no title, no poster typography, no label text, no watermark.

PALETTE: paper #f7f5f2 (cream). Structure ink #1a1816 (warm near-black) for all linework and forms. Accent #7a2828 (wine red) used sparingly — the character's red beanie and red cape only.

NO LABELS, NO TEXT, NO TITLE. Keep it pure illustration.


Aspect ratio: 3:4.
